infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Grass Guru uses your camera to identify your grass type.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Grass Guru accesses your photos to identify your grass type.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Grass Guru uses your location to determine your climate zone and USDA hardiness zone for accurate lawn care recommendations.
